column1: # bench k maxM nmeas clifft_ns auth_ns speedup_auth lean_ns speedup_lean fallback_pct adapt_ns speedup_adapt adapt_policy best_path best_speedup regime bitexact cg_N cg_ns speedup_cg cg_route cg_bitexact
# FOUR MDAM paths, cold-amortized ns/shot (total_wall/N), taskset -c 2, single-thread BLAS.  speedup_X = clifft_ns/X_ns.
# MDAM's ONLY cache is BoundaryKey -> boundary-transition result (the sg tables).  The former dense-STATE
# snapshot pool (mc_pool, fallback-restore shortcut) is REMOVED FROM THE ALGORITHM (compiled default
# mc_pool_off=1): caching state contradicts the MDAM principle (state is materialized only at measurement
# time).  Ablation (pool_ablate.tsv, bit-exact 22/22): pool OFF is win-or-parity on 9/11 benches
# (d3_r3 2.76x->2.99x, cult_d5 0.69x->0.71x), costs -6..-12% only on the two off-axis rx benches
# (expensive dense-core rebuild on miss), eliminates every 296-533MB pool peak and EVERY memory-budget
# event.  Peak cache memory is now the BoundaryKey tables alone (max 63MB, cultivation_d5); the adaptive
# memory ladder reduces to freeze-vs-AUTH (pool-evict rung is vacuous).  lean/adapt/cg columns re-measured
# on this build; auth untouched (never used the pool).
#   auth  = authoritative (run()/sample_batch): no cache, constant memory.  Wins via r<<k localization.
#   lean  = LEAN-FORCED ablation of the production entry (FORCE_LEAN cfg): the AUTH route is disabled and
#           everything else is IDENTICAL to cg -- pure-LEAN probe, self-relative compile gate, race
#           (interpreted vs compiled walk), cruise; miss -> run_mcache same-seed replay (recomputes; no
#           state restore).  Same N and cold-single-call protocol as cg, so (cg - lean) isolates exactly
#           the value of the AUTH option, and (lean vs nocompile-adapt) the value of compilation.
#           fallback_pct = overall miss fraction of the forced-LEAN run.
#   adapt = ADAPTIVE executor v2 (run_lean_adapt_batch, MEASURED-CRITERION, cold single call, DEFAULT config).
#           All decisions from measured quantities -- no tuned demote thresholds:
#           [0] T_auth calibrated on the first min(512, N/4, ~1s) shots via run() (those shots are normal output);
#           [1] LEAN runs with sampled T_walk (hit shots) + T_slow (miss shots) + per-window fb/D history;
#           [2] fb_be = (T_auth-T_walk)/(T_slow-T_walk): below it LEAN is faster than AUTH *now* (cost identity);
#           [3] if LOSING (fb_w > fb_be): keep LEAN iff the Heaps-law fit (fb ~ phi*N^(beta-1), log-log OLS, R2- and
#               dual-slope-checked) projects recoupment inside the batch: phi*(N^b-n^b)/b*(T_slow-T_walk) <=
#               (T_auth-T_walk)*(N-n); else demote to AUTH.  Identity fast path: zero completed walks AND measured
#               T_slow >= T_auth -> demote immediately (heavy-core all-miss, e.g. d5_r5 @255).  Magicless
#               early-localization exit unchanged (d7_r1/d5_r1 @639).
#           [4] MEMORY NEVER DECIDES THE REGIME: tables over the (optional) resource guard -> freeze learning
#               (inserts stop; walk + fallback continue) iff frozen-LEAN still beats T_auth, else demote.
#               No bench reaches the guard on this build.
#   cg    = full production entry (mdam_run.run_batch on the v2 executor): probe(adaptive) ->
#           route(AUTH/adaptive) -> self-relative gate -> race(interpreted vs circuit-compiled walk) -> cruise.
#           Measured cold single-call with the per-circuit .so PRE-CACHED (circuit-lifetime scenario; first-ever run
#           adds one g++ ~5-6s only when the gate engages).  cg_route: ENG=compiled walk cruised, leanfb=race kept
#           interpreted, adaptive=fb stayed above the gate, AUTH=probe demoted.
# K reduction: k=nominal magic (Clifft dense=2^k); maxM=MDAM peak materialized magic.
# VERIFIED on the pool-free build: adapt vs authoritative sample_batch bit-exact 11/11 benches (2x2000);
#   lean vs sample_batch bit-exact on all re-measured rows; cg spot 2x2000 per row.
# NOTES: cultivation_d3 adapt/cg at N=1e6 (native reduce_full gap ~1/2M shots blocks larger single streams; fires on
#   ALL native paths incl authoritative; cg seed-retries disclosed in cg_route).  coherent_d5_r5 at N=8000.
#   best_path = argmin over auth/lean/adapt/cg (oracle; lean is memory-UNBOUNDED so quote adapt/cg for production).
#   Clifft = external paper baseline only (never referenced inside MDAM; every runtime gate is self-relative);
#   ratios factual, losses (<1x) included, no "beats" framing.
# bit-exact = adapt vs sample_batch spot 2x2000; cg_bitexact = run_batch vs sample_batch spot 2x2000
#   (OK* = coherent_d5_r5 skipped: its 8000-shot run IS the verified adaptive probe path by construction).
